name: trados-powershell-mcp
description: MCP server wrapping the RWS Trados Studio, GroupShare, and Language Cloud PowerShell toolkits. Manage projects, translation memories, packages, and users through Claude.

studio_version.title: Studio Version
studio_version.description: Trados Studio folder name: Studio17 (2022) or Studio18 (2024)

studio_modules_path.title: Studio Toolkit Modules Path
studio_modules_path.description: Path to the PS5 modules folder containing the Studio PowerShell Toolkit (e.g. C:\Users\YourName\Documents\WindowsPowerShell\Modules). Leave blank if installed in the default location.

gs_modules_path.title: GroupShare Toolkit Modules Path
gs_modules_path.description: Path to the PS7 modules folder containing the GroupShare PowerShell Toolkit (e.g. C:\Users\YourName\Documents\PowerShell\Modules\GroupShare). Leave blank if installed in the default location.

lc_modules_path.title: Language Cloud Toolkit Modules Path
lc_modules_path.description: Path to the PS7 modules folder containing the Language Cloud PowerShell Toolkit (e.g. C:\Users\YourName\Documents\PowerShell\Modules\LanguageCloud). Leave blank if installed in the default location.

gs_credential_store.title: GroupShare Credential Store
gs_credential_store.description: Path to a folder containing DPAPI-encrypted GroupShare credential XML files created with Export-CliXml. Preferred over raw credentials.

gs_server_url.title: GroupShare Server URL
gs_server_url.description: GroupShare server URL (e.g. https://groupshare.example.com). Used only if credential store is not set.

gs_username.title: GroupShare Username
gs_username.description: GroupShare username. Used only if credential store is not set.

gs_password.title: GroupShare Password
gs_password.description: GroupShare password. Used only if credential store is not set.

lc_credential_store.title: Language Cloud Credential Store
lc_credential_store.description: Path to a folder containing DPAPI-encrypted Language Cloud credential XML files created with Export-CliXml. Preferred over raw credentials.

lc_client_id.title: Language Cloud Client ID
lc_client_id.description: Language Cloud application Client ID. Used only if credential store is not set.

lc_client_secret.title: Language Cloud Client Secret
lc_client_secret.description: Language Cloud application Client Secret. Used only if credential store is not set.

lc_tenant_id.title: Language Cloud Tenant ID
lc_tenant_id.description: Language Cloud Tenant ID (Trados Account ID). Used only if credential store is not set.
